---
title: "ADHD-HIV-PrEP"
image: "images/logo_final_orange_darkbg_v2.png"
about:
  template: marquee
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 60%
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

*Deutsche Übersetzung folgt.*

This website is about the intersection of neurodiversity, specifically
attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD), and HIV, including
people living with HIV and people taking HIV pre-exposure prophylaxis
(PrEP).

*(This text is a placeholder and will be expanded.)*

Our current project is [The Survey](Survey.qmd), a cross-sectional
survey estimating how common ADHD traits are among people living with
HIV and PrEP users in Switzerland.
